channel.title: Fellowship of Business Leaders
channel.description: Recent content on Fellowship of Business Leaders

item.title: Beyond the Boys' Club: Building Excellence, Not Exclusion
item.description: The strongest networks aren’t built on who you exclude. They’re built on who you’re willing to learn from, be challenged by, and grow alongside.

item.title: Stronger Together: Why Men and Women Both Belong at the Table
item.description: Leadership excellence isn’t about who gets the seat at the table. It’s about making sure the table is strong enough to hold the weight of what we’re building together.

item.title: The Hidden Risk in Leadership: Isolation at the Top
item.description: Isolation is the silent risk most leaders never talk about. From the outside, executive life looks powerful — influence, authority, control. But at the top, circles get smaller. Conversations get filtered. And the higher you climb, the fewer people you can speak honestly with.

item.title: Welcome to Fellowship of Business Leaders
item.description: Introducing FBL - a new kind of leadership community built on conviction, accountability, and faith-driven excellence.

item.title: Building Accountability, Not Affirmation
item.description: Most leaders surround themselves with people who affirm their decisions. The best leaders surround themselves with people who challenge them.

item.title: Faith and Business: Integration Over Compartmentalization
item.description: Your faith and your business aren’t separate compartments. They’re meant to inform each other, strengthen each other, and operate as one integrated whole.

item.title: First Quarterly Gathering - Save the Date
item.description: Join us for our inaugural quarterly gathering where leaders come together for strategic connection, accountability, and faith-driven growth.
